titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Davenport College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1934-1973 Maintained by the Master
Davenport College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1934-1973 Maintained by the Master
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday September 4, 2020 at 07:16

did.unittitle: Davenport College, Yale University, student records for the Classes of 1934-1973 maintained by the master
did.abstract: The materials consist of student records maintained by the master of Davenport College, Yale University.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 13-F-2 (YRG 13-F-2), Records of the master of Davenport College

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See inventory for details

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Davenport College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1934-1973 Maintained by the Master (RU 872). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of student records maintained by the master of Davenport College, Yale University

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The title "Master" for chief executive officers of residential colleges was changed to "Head of College" in April of 2016.

did.unittitle: Student records for the Classes of 1934-1973
